start.text: The sun is blazing, the beer is flowing, and the beach is PACKED with college students. You're 21, ripped from hitting the gym all winter, and ready to make this spring break legendary. You scan the crowd, spotting a group of girls playing volleyball nearby, and a cute blonde sunbathing just a few yards away. What's your move?

choices.text: Head over to the volleyball game and try to join in.
Casually stroll over to the sunbather and strike up a conversation.
Grab another beer and continue scoping out the scene.

volleyball_approach.text: You walk over to the volleyball game, trying to look athletic and nonchalant. The girls seem friendly enough. One of them, a brunette with a killer smile, asks if you want to join. 'Sure,' you say, trying to hide the fact you haven't played in months. You immediately shank your first serve...

choices.text: Play it cool and laugh it off.
Blame it on the sun and try again.

sunbather_approach.text: You walk over to the blonde, trying to look confident. 'Hey,' you say, 'nice tan.' She looks up, smiles, and says, 'Thanks! It's been a long winter.' She's even cuter up close. She asks your name.

choices.text: Give her your name and ask for hers.
Try to be smooth and say, 'Only the name you need to know.'

beer_and_scope.text: You grab another beer and continue scanning the crowd. You spot a group of girls doing a TikTok dance, and a few others flirting near the water. Suddenly, you feel a tap on your shoulder...

choices.text: Turn around and see who it is.

volleyball_laugh.text: You laugh it off, saying, 'Just getting warmed up!' The brunette giggles and gives you a playful shove. You're in! The game continues, and you find yourself chatting with her between serves. She seems really into you.

volleyball_approach_choice1.text: The brunette laughs, 'Don't worry about it, happens to the best of us!' She offers to show you some basic serving technique. As she gets close, you can smell her coconut sunscreen… and something else.

choices.text: Flirt back, making eye contact.
Try to play it cool and focus on the technique.

volleyball_approach_choice1_flirt.text: She blushes slightly, enjoying the attention. 'So, are you here with a big group, or just winging it?' she asks, bumping your arm playfully.

choices.text: Tell her you're with friends, but open to meeting new people.
Tell her you're a lone wolf, ready for adventure.

volleyball_approach_choice1_flirt_friend.text: She smiles. 'Nice. Maybe we can all hang out later?' She gives you her number. Score!

choices.text: Text her immediately.

volleyball_approach_choice1_flirt_lone.text: Her eyes light up. 'Perfect! I love a little mystery.' She suggests grabbing drinks after the game.

choices.text: Accept enthusiastically.

volleyball_approach_choice1_cool.text: She demonstrates the technique, her hand brushing against yours. You try again, and this time it's a little better. Still not great, but passable.

choices.text: Thank her and try to join the game.

volleyball_approach_ending_success.text: Later that night, you're making out with her on the beach. Spring break is going *perfectly*. THE END.

volleyball_approach_ending_passable.text: You join the game, managing to not completely embarrass yourself. She smiles at you encouragingly. Not a bad start to spring break. THE END.

sunbather_approach_choice1.text: 'I'm Jake,' you say with a grin. 'What's your name?'

choices.text: Flirt a little more.
Keep it casual.

sunbather_approach_flirt.text: 'Jake,' she repeats, smiling. 'I'm Sarah. Nice to meet you, Jake. You're looking pretty tan yourself.' She glances at your abs. 'Spending a lot of time in the sun?'

choices.text: Playfully boast about your workouts.
Be a little more humble.

sunbather_approach_workout.text: You flex slightly. 'A few hours at the gym every day. Gotta stay in shape for spring break, right?' Sarah laughs. 'Show off!' She seems amused. 'Want to grab a drink later?'

choices.text: Definitely say yes!
Play a little hard to get.

sunbather_approach_drink_yes.text: You grin. 'Definitely! What time?' Sarah says, 'How about 8 at the beach bar?' You exchange numbers. Looks like spring break is off to a good start!

sunbather_sundown_wait.text: You shrug casually. 'Maybe. Depends on how the afternoon goes.' Sarah smiles, intrigued. 'Alright, Mr. Mysterious. I'll see you around then.'

beer_and_scope_choice1.text: It's a cute blonde with a mischievous grin. "Hey," she says, "you look like you could use some company."

choices.text: Flirt back, smooth and confident.
Play it cool, a little shy.

blonde_flirt.text: She laughs. "Good. I'm Sarah. What's your name, handsome?" She gestures towards the water. "Wanna come take a dip with us?"

choices.text: Definitely. Let's go!
Maybe later. Let's chat for a bit first.

blonde_shy.text: She smiles, amused. "Aww, shy? That's cute. I'm Sarah. You can call me anything you want later." She winks.

choices.text: Get a little bolder. "I'm [Your Name]."
Stay shy, but offer a smile.

water_with_sarah.text: You and Sarah splash into the waves, laughing. Her bikini top is a little… revealing. Things are heating up quickly. You spend the next hour playing in the water, and she's definitely feeling you.

choices.text: Make a move for a kiss.
Keep it playful for now.

sarah_kiss.text: She doesn't resist. The kiss is salty and sweet. You've officially scored on spring break. THE END.
